subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! His honor Mirza Husayn, upon him be the glory of the Most Glorious, made mention of thee at the Threshold of the Blessed Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله جناب میرزا حسین علیه بهاء الله الابهی ذکرت را در آستان جمال مبارک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
